task_completion.description: Compute reverse-coded items and personality scale scores
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Data tab, new columns named 'E1r', 'E2r', 'Extra', and 'Neuro' should be visible.

task_completion.description: Run Cronbach's alpha and McDonald's omega on Extraversion items
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Results panel, a 'Reliability Analysis' table should be visible for the Extraversion items (E1r, E2r, E3, E4, E5), displaying both Cronbach's alpha (approx 0.765) and McDonald's omega.

task_completion.description: Run hierarchical linear regression with two blocks and diagnostics
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Results panel, 'Linear Regression' tables should show Model 1 (gender) and Model 2 (gender, Extra, Neuro). The output must include Model Fit measures (R² change approx 0.016), Model Coefficients with Standardized Estimates and Confidence Intervals, Collinearity Statistics (VIF approx 1.08), and the Durbin-Watson statistic (approx 1.84).

task_completion.description: Save residuals and run descriptive statistics with Shapiro-Wilk and Q-Q plot
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jamovi Data tab, a new column for Residuals should be present. In the Results panel, a 'Descriptives' section for the Residuals should show the Shapiro-Wilk W statistic (approx 0.917) and p-value, along with a Q-Q plot.

task_completion.description: Save the Jamovi project as Personality_Age.omv
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi window title should display 'Personality_Age.omv', or a file manager/terminal window should show the file saved in ~/Documents/Jamovi/.

task_completion.description: Write the analysis report with 13 specific numeric values
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of 'age_analysis_report.txt' containing the required statistical values (alpha, R-squareds, F, p, betas, VIFs, Durbin-Watson, Shapiro-Wilk).

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jamovi interface with the analysis setup and results, rather than terminal commands running R or Python scripts to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The results in Jamovi match the expected statistical outputs
integrity.visual_evidence: The values in the Jamovi Results panel should match the expected values (e.g., Alpha ~0.765, R² change ~0.016), indicating genuine computation rather than mocked UI.

integrity.description: The report contains values extracted from the actual analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: The numbers in 'age_analysis_report.txt' should correspond to the outputs visible in the Jamovi Results panel.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected statistical values: Extraversion Cronbach's alpha ≈ 0.765; Block 1 R² ≈ 0.0015; Block 2 R² ≈ 0.0174; R² change ≈ 0.0158 (or 0.016); Block 2 overall model F-statistic ≈ 14.3 with p < 0.001; Standardized beta for Extraversion ≈ 0.043; Standardized beta for Neuroticism ≈ -0.109; VIF values ≈ 1.08; Durbin-Watson d ≈ 1.84; Shapiro-Wilk W for residuals ≈ 0.917 with p < 0.001.
